user.title: Aqara M1S Zigbee Router
user.description: Connect to an Aqara M1S Gen 1 converted to a JN5189 Zigbee Router.

init.title: Sound file management
init.description: Choose whether to upload a new WAV file or delete an existing file from the protected Chinese sound folder.

upload_sound.title: Upload WAV sound
upload_sound.description: Select an uncompressed PCM WAV file: mono, 32000 Hz, signed 32-bit little-endian. It will be uploaded to /data/musics/music-ch using its original filename.

delete_sound.title: Delete WAV sound
delete_sound.description: Select the file to delete. Only WAV files inside /data/musics/music-ch are displayed and files in other Aqara folders are protected.

error.upload_failed: Upload failed. Verify the WAV format and hub connection.
error.delete_failed: Delete failed. Verify the hub connection.

abort.no_managed_sounds: No WAV files were found in /data/musics/music-ch.
